title: fix(deps): update module tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface to v1.1.0

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>cncf-tags/container-device-interface (tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface)</summary>

### [`v1.1.0`](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/releases/tag/v1.1.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/compare/v1.0.1...v1.1.0)

#### What's Changed

- pkg/cdi: rename test-files to have the correct suffix, and remove legacy build-tags by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [#​268](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/268)
- Bump golangci/golangci-lint-action from 6 to 7 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​266](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/266)
- .github: cross-build binaries on ubuntu-latest. by [@​klihub](https://redirect.github.com/klihub) in [#​274](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/274)
- SPEC.md: minor grammar fix in error handling section. by [@​klihub](https://redirect.github.com/klihub) in [#​273](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/273)
- Update SECURITY.md by [@​elezar](https://redirect.github.com/elezar) in [#​276](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/276)
- README: fix hooks example per schema by [@​mythi](https://redirect.github.com/mythi) in [#​270](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/270)
- Bump golangci/golangci-lint-action from 7 to 8 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​271](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/271)
- README: Docker 28.2 enables CDI by default by [@​vvoland](https://redirect.github.com/vvoland) in [#​277](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/277)
- Remove deprecated RDT fields by [@​askervin](https://redirect.github.com/askervin) in [#​278](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/278)
- Bump actions/checkout from 4 to 5 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​280](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/280)
- Bump actions/stale from 9 to 10 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​284](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/284)
- Bump actions/setup-go from 5 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​283](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/283)
- Allow root CLOS in IntelRdt.closID by [@​marquiz](https://redirect.github.com/marquiz) in [#​286](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/286)
- Bump golangci/golangci-lint-action from 8 to 9 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​289](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/289)
- go.{mod,sum}: bump runtime tools, spec deps to v1.3.0. by [@​klihub](https://redirect.github.com/klihub) in [#​290](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/290)
- cmd/cdi: remove commented out code by [@​marquiz](https://redirect.github.com/marquiz) in [#​293](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/293)
- Add IntelRdt schemata and enableMonitoring fields by [@​marquiz](https://redirect.github.com/marquiz) in [#​292](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/292)
- specs-go: fix minumum version check for IntelRdt. by [@​klihub](https://redirect.github.com/klihub) in [#​294](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/294)
- Bump actions/checkout from 5 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​295](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/295)
- Ensure that filemode is set for device nodes by [@​elezar](https://redirect.github.com/elezar) in [#​275](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/275)
- Correct version in SPEC.md by [@​elezar](https://redirect.github.com/elezar) in [#​297](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/297)
- Add support for (Linux) net device injection. by [@​klihub](https://redirect.github.com/klihub) in [#​269](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/269)
- Bump version to v1.1.0 by [@​elezar](https://redirect.github.com/elezar) in [#​299](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/299)

#### New Contributors

- [@​mythi](https://redirect.github.com/mythi) made their first contribution in [#​270](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/270)
- [@​vvoland](https://redirect.github.com/vvoland) made their first contribution in [#​277](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/277)
- [@​askervin](https://redirect.github.com/askervin) made their first contribution in [#​278](https://redirect.github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/278)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/compare/v1.0.1...v1.1.0>

</details>
